title: From RAG to Memory: Non-Parametric Continual Learning for Large Language Models

defines.name: HippoRAG 2
defines.definition: A retrieval-augmented generation framework that improves non-parametric continual learning by combining Personalized PageRank with deeper passage integration and more effective online LLM use.

problem: Standard vector-based and structure-augmented RAG methods fail to robustly support human-like long-term memory across factual, sense-making, and associative tasks.
